basic_details.short_information: Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website of the Ministry of External Affairs. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MEA Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 55 years Maximum Age: 63 years

qualification.details: Doctoral/Master’s degree in Law or other suitable qualification. Good communication skills. Good skills in English speaking and writing. Good knowledge in computers for preparing documents, presentations, datasheets etc.

selection_process: Application Review Shortlisting Interview / Written Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MEA Consultant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
